rti-111.dose_note: Note, the drug is reportedly painful to insufflate. The duration between oral and insufflation are roughly around the same.
rti-111.name: rti-111

properties.dose: Oral Light: 10-15mg Common: 15-30mg Strong: 30-50mg | Insufflated Light: 5-10mg Common: 10-20mg Strong: 20-40mg. | Note, the drug is reportedly painful to insufflate. The duration between oral and insufflation are roughly around the same.
properties.summary: Stimulant of the phenyltropane class that acts as a SNDRI. The drug is suspected to have slightly slower onset and slightly longer duration than its parent compound cocaine. The drug is the tropane analogue of 3,4-CTMP.
